title: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease proteomics.
author: Rodriguez-Suarez E Duce AM Caballeria J Martinez Arrieta F Fernandez E Gomara C Alkorta N Ariz U Martinez-Chantar ML Lu SC Elortza F Mato JM
content:
S-EPMC3040121 PMC3040121 Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease proteomics.

Purpose

Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD) is an important cause of chronic liver injury that has gained concern in clinical hepatology. The principal aim of this study was to find differences in protein
